details.title: TARGET SMASH!
details.description:
Run and Slide through levels while sharp shooting targets to rack up a combo. Proform flips, wall jumps, use your grapple chain, and gun to get S rank in 3 levels!

This game was made for the Big Mode game Jam, though I was visiting my lovley girlfriend for the most of it so it was pushed out in 3 days. 
Please enjoy and leave a comment with ur times and ranks <3  Controls:

game.title: Cold Hard Cash
game.short_text: Play as a delivery driver who must deliver food during a historic snowstorm

details.title: Cold Hard Cash
details.description:
Supports controllers!
(Average playtime: 15-30 Minutes)
You are a delivery driver for BigBites. The weather report has announced that one of
the worst winter storms in decades is going to hit the city.
It's advised to stay inside and not drive.
But... the people are hungry, and you kinda need the money...

Drive fast but don't crash!

Every second counts and the people are waiting, so you will have to be quick on the road, BUT be careful not to crash too often to make sure the food makes it in one piece...


(Made for Bigmode Jam 2026) Credits:
Robocop278: Lead Programmer/ UI Art
Samdegroot: Programmer/ Lead Level Designer
R3CREAM: Lead Composer/Sound Designer
S4m the wise: Lead 3d/2d artist

game.title: ONE NIGHT WINDOW
game.short_text: She's in town for ONE NIGHT only!  Can you seal the deal?

details.title: ONE NIGHT WINDOW
details.description:
An INFLUENCER is in town for ONE NIGHT only!  Do you have what it takes to rizz her up and get her number?  Learn your way to each girls heart through slick dialogue trees and even slicker items to upgrade your looks!-~=+=~-
This is a comedy based RPG making fun of dating sims and dating culture.
Make your way through the two main girls to gain access to the exclusive VIP lounge where the INFLUENCER awaits!
If you can't figure it out,  talk to the GOTH GIRL and the SORORITY GIRL and they'll lead the way to those sweet digits!
Controls:
WASD/Arrow Keys: MOVE
Z/E/Enter: SELECT
X: CANCEL
ESC: PAUSE
F3 is debug if you get stuck in that screen!Unzip (the folder) and run the .exe file inside!

moreInfo.Authors: WoogLord, Gympiecuddles, DuragKennyK, Nerostratos, Aldine KSP

game.title: Carwash Calamity
game.short_text: Wash cars, hose down the grime and confront the creatures clinging beneath the surface in slick, surreal battles.

details.title: Carwash Calamity
details.description:
left mouse click - activate hose 
move mouse - move hose and hand
esc - pause

In Carwash Calamity, some patches of dirt hide something alive. As you hose down filthy cars, certain stains erupt into bullet-hell encounters against the strange creatures dwelling within the grime. Dodge, survive, and clear every last speck to restore the car to a flawless, slick finish. Clean fast, every hit to you is decreased time from your timer, and customers hate waiting.DaVinci789: Programmerpijinguy: Designerlilchokedout: ArtistVirginia Leo: Composer

game.title: Null Signal
game.short_text: 3D  neon wireframe runner that reacts to music played

details.title: Null Signal
details.description:
Be a wire-frame mesh ball that endlessly runs forward in a world that reacts to the beat of any MP3 file. 
Dodge everything red while trying to roll through boost rings and diamonds. Bounce pads are also there to help you dodge sections of the road. Watch out for the glitching red floor spots as they will slow you down a bit when ran over. 
_________
The goal so far is to just survive from falling off the sides of the map before your song ends. I had left up invisible bumpers on both sides of the playing field for quite a long distance to help stop early falling off. All of that will be improved upon soon to be better understood within the game itself. Had to take some shortcuts to get it finished in time for the game jam!
I added a file explorer so you could test out whatever song you want. 
Please use Alt + F4 if you want to leave mid game. I had accidentally left in code to hide the mouse cursor once you click start. Was originally to help me record the video without my cursor showing up. Oops lol. I'll have this fixed by this Friday so this whole paragraph will be gone by then. 
______________________________________________________________
Game is not nearly done and I will be giving regular updates to the game where I will add more features to make it complete. My goal is to have it be truly endless with map changes that will drastically alter the way it looks and feels while keeping true to the wire-frame look.If you are still reading this, then know that you could just continuously hit the space bar to jump higher & higher. It was an error with how I coded the jump where as long as your momentum is going upwarrds still, you can keep jumping. I'm trying to think of a a way to implement this into the gameplay itself to be beneficial. Runs perfectly from the .exe in the zip I made. You can drop any mp3 into the music folder I included before playing to make it easier.

moreInfo.Author: MrBuscemi
moreInfo.Tags: 3D Platformer, Abstract, Endless Runner, glitch, Low-poly, Neon, Procedural Generation, Singleplayer, wireframe

game.title: Dive Knight
game.short_text: Chain moves, combo grooves, slide smoove

details.title: Dive Knight
details.description:
Dive, spin, swirl, twirl, bounce, pounce, and dodge as you tear your way through enemies on your journey to your valiant steed. 
Try to earn the gold medal! Those are some of the fastest times we play tested, so feel free to be content with silver, like the Squire you are. (If you do manage to beat our times, post a comment! We'll add your fastest times as the coveted platinum medal.)
WASD to move, R to reset. Walking is for losers anyway.



Made for the Bigmode 2026 Game Jam!
If you run into any trouble figuring out what to do we attached a gameplay video where we play through the game to this page. We briefly discuss the bugs, but mostly we fuck around. 
When we first saw the prompt, we wondered what was truly slick in games. Is it an oil spill? A car driving game? We settled on trying to create some fluid movements and quick combos, which we feel embody the essence of slickness. Despite some bugs with the movement, we found that this ended up pretty damn slick.

game.title: A Penguin Isekai: My New Life as a Suave Penguin! Readily Accepting my Role as the Village Protector

details.title: A Penguin Isekai: My New Life as a Suave Penguin! Readily Accepting my Role as the Village Protector
details.description:
(if you die and wish to retry, the opening can be skipped with spacebar)

When a human boy has a surprise rendezvous with Truck-kun, he wakes up to find himself in a new world inhabited by Penguins and in desperate need of a Hero! 
He becomes Ping the Penguin, and with a surprising lack of contemplation, accepts his role as the village protector! Can Ping save the village from Leon the Leopard Seal's Evil Lava Spell and his Viking goons, using only his trusty ice cannon and slick sunnies?
Probably!

DrHoodie - Lead programming, voice of Ping and human boy
EMCIEL - Sound Effects, music, voice of enemy ram
Jamless/Forbic - Sprite animations, title screen, programming, voice of enemy crow
RagingClue - Cutscene artwork, tilesets, voice of mom and penguins
xoDucks - Programming, music, voice of announcer and penguins

game.title: Gun Knife Bomb
game.short_text: A Rock-Paper-Scissors gambling game with deadly weapons.

details.title: Gun Knife Bomb
details.description:
Play Rock-Paper-Scissors with deadly weapons to be initiated into the elite military branch known as S.L.I.C.K.
---How to Play---
Gun beats Knife, Knife beats Bomb, Bomb beats Gun.
Each weapon has 3 lives. When you lose with a weapon, it loses a life.
Lose 3 lives on any of your weapons, and you lose the game. Take 3 lives on an opponent's weapon and win.
The scoreboard represents the lives of each weapon - the enemy's on top and yours on the bottom, in the order of gun knife bomb.

 Use W & S to cycle between looking at the enemy's board, the center of the table, and your board.

Hover over modifiers on either side of the board to see what they do.

Click modifiers to use them up for the round, click the buttons to select your weapon, and click the lever to lock in your choices.

moreInfo.Author: XCathedraGames
moreInfo.Tags: 3D, Dark, First-Person, gambling, Horror, Psychological Horror, Roguelike, Singleplayer

game.title: Slick Tricks
game.short_text: Dodge and survive until the song is over

details.title: Slick Tricks
details.description:
This is an entry for the Bigmode Game Jam 2026, made by me, Aimless Studios and my lovely wife, Dilosh Designs
We chose two definitions for the theme "slick" (Source: https://dictionary.cambridge.org/dictionary/english/slick):
"operating or performing skilfully and effectively, without problems and without seeming to need effort" "smooth, wet and slippery (= difficult to move on without sliding)"

Controls:

A/Left: move left
D/Right: move right
W/Up: Jump
S/Down: Stomp
Space: do a random trick
ESC: Pause

Features:
Slick beatsOne level with a soundtrack of 2:45Pick ups (extra score, extra HP, double jump, invincibility)Tricks (frontflip and backflip) which make you invulnerable during the performanceUpgrades (+HP, pick up spawn chance, more points per trick, more tricks per round, lower cooldown for tricks)Due to time constraits, we weren't able to polish the game enough regarding animations, sound effects and bug fixing, but we hope you like it :)

Description:
In Slick Tricks, you control "Slick Rick, the Trickster", an ice cube with one mission: survive and do as many tricks as you can
Different pick ups spawn that will help you during a round
Buy upgrades to survive even longer and make sure not to die until the end of the song (two minutes, 45 seconds)

Disclaimer:
WARNING: This game may potentially trigger seizures for people with photosensitive epilepsy.

moreInfo.Author: Aimless Studios
moreInfo.Tags: 2D, Bullet Hell, Indie, No AI, slick
